name: sendbird/cc-plugin-codex
summary: Claude Code bridge for Codex that runs tracked review jobs, rescue tasks, and blocking review gates, with structured ALLOW/BLOCK decisions and worktree-aware review isolation.
evidence: Provides a real Codex plugin manifest, Codex lifecycle hooks, stop-time review gate, unread-result reminders, tracked job state, and review/adversarial-review/rescue skills.
Runs Claude Code as a bounded reviewer or rescue worker from inside Codex, parsing structured ALLOW/BLOCK review output and supporting review worktrees and sandbox modes.
Includes Apache-2.0 license plus NOTICE and tests covering hooks, tracked jobs, state, sandbox modes, structured output, and review worktree behavior.
